item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-02)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41207 Trending skills: 18798 Hot skills: 2313 Top All Time: find-skills (373868) Top Trending: agent-tools (13496) Top Hot: remotion-render (800)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): agent-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 108 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: name: agent-ui

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): widgets-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 96 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: name: widgets-ui

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): chat-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 103 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: name: chat-ui

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): browser-use
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 66 Source: browser-use/browser-use Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): javascript-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 94 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, integrate 150+ models. Package: @inferencesh/sdk (npm install). Full TypeScript support, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, human approval. Use for: JavaScript integration, TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, frontend apps. Triggers: javascript sdk, typescript sdk, npm install, node.js api, js client, react ai, next.js ai, frontend sdk, @inferencesh/sdk, typescript agent, browser sdk, js integration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): ai-content-pipeline
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 60 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Build multi-step AI content creation pipelines combining image, video, audio, and text. Workflow examples: generate image -> animate -> add voiceover -> merge with music. Tools: FLUX, Veo, Kokoro TTS, OmniHuman, media merger, upscaling. Use for: YouTube videos, social media content, marketing materials, automated content. Triggers: content pipeline, ai workflow, content creation, multi-step ai, content automation, ai video workflow, generate and edit, ai content factory, automated content creation, ai production pipeline, media pipeline, content at scale

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): product-changelog
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 64 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Product changelog and release notes that users actually read. Covers categorization, user-facing language, visuals, and distribution. Use for: release notes, changelogs, product updates, feature announcements, versioning. Triggers: changelog, release notes, product update, version notes, what's new, feature announcement, product changelog, update log, release announcement, version release, product release, ship notes

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): customer-persona
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 66 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Research-backed customer persona creation with market data and avatar generation. Covers demographics, psychographics, jobs-to-be-done, journey mapping, and anti-personas. Use for: marketing strategy, product development, UX research, sales enablement, content strategy. Triggers: customer persona, buyer persona, user persona, target audience, ideal customer, customer profile, audience research, user research, icp, ideal customer profile, target market, customer avatar, audience persona

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): competitor-teardown
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 57 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Structured competitive analysis with feature matrices, SWOT, positioning maps, and UX review. Covers research frameworks, pricing comparison, review mining, and visual deliverables. Use for: market research, competitive intelligence, investor decks, product strategy, sales enablement. Triggers: competitor analysis, competitive analysis, competitor teardown, market research, competitive intelligence, swot analysis, competitor comparison, market landscape, competitor review, competitive landscape, feature comparison, market positioning

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): book-cover-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 66 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Book cover design with genre-specific conventions, typography rules, and AI image generation. Covers fiction and non-fiction genres, sizing, thumbnail testing, and iteration workflows. Use for: self-publishing, ebook covers, print covers, audiobook covers, cover mockups. Triggers: book cover, cover design, ebook cover, book art, novel cover, self publishing cover, kindle cover, audiobook cover, book jacket, cover illustration, fiction cover, nonfiction cover

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): ai-podcast-creation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 63 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Create AI-powered podcasts with text-to-speech, music, and audio editing. Tools: Kokoro TTS, DIA TTS, Chatterbox, AI music generation, media merger. Capabilities: multi-voice conversations, background music, intro/outro, full episodes. Use for: podcast production, audiobooks, voice content, audio newsletters. Triggers: podcast, ai podcast, text to speech podcast, audio content, voice over, ai audiobook, multi voice, conversation ai, notebooklm alternative, audio generation, podcast automation, ai narrator, voice content, audio newsletter, podcast maker

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): seo-content-brief
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 59 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: SEO content brief creation with keyword research, search intent analysis, and content structure. Covers SERP analysis, heading hierarchy, word count targets, and internal linking strategy. Use for: content briefs, SEO writing, blog strategy, content planning, keyword targeting. Triggers: seo content brief, content brief, seo brief, keyword research, search intent, content strategy, blog brief, seo writing, content planning, keyword targeting, serp analysis, content outline, seo article, blog seo

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): pitch-deck-visuals
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 60 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Investor pitch deck structure with slide-by-slide framework, visual design rules, and data presentation. Covers the 12-slide framework, chart types, team slides, and common investor turn-offs. Use for: fundraising decks, investor presentations, startup pitch, demo day, grant proposals. Triggers: pitch deck, investor deck, startup pitch, fundraising deck, demo day, pitch presentation, investor presentation, seed deck, series a deck, pitch slides, startup presentation, vc pitch, investor meeting

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): background-removal
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 61 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Remove backgrounds from images with BiRefNet via inference.sh CLI. Model: BiRefNet (high accuracy background removal). Use for: product photos, portraits, e-commerce, transparent PNGs, photo editing. Triggers: remove background, background removal, remove bg, transparent background, cut out image, background remover, rembg, product photo editing, cutout, transparent png, bg removal, photo cutout

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): llm-models
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 52 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Access Claude, Gemini, Kimi, GLM and 100+ LLMs via inference.sh CLI using OpenRouter. Models: Claude Opus 4.5, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Claude Haiku 4.5, Gemini 3 Pro, Kimi K2, GLM-4.6, Intellect 3. One API for all models with automatic fallback and cost optimization. Use for: AI assistants, code generation, reasoning, agents, chat, content generation. Triggers: claude api, openrouter, llm api, claude sonnet, claude opus, gemini api, kimi, language model, gpt alternative, anthropic api, ai model api, llm access, chat api, claude alternative, openai alternative

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#43): chat-ui
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 1744 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: name: chat-ui

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#44): agent-ui
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 1736 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: name: agent-ui

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#45): widgets-ui
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 1718 Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: name: widgets-ui

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#46): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 1653 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): agent-browser
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1608 Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#48): vercel-composition-patterns
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 1492 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components, render props, context providers, or component architecture.

item.title: [All Time] Rank up (21 → 18): azure-rbac
item.description: All Time leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #21 Current rank: #18 Delta: +3 Installs: 98284 (prev 94308) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Helps users find the right Azure RBAC role for an identity with least privilege access, then generate CLI commands and Bicep code to assign it. USE FOR: "what role should I assign", "least privilege role", "RBAC role for", "role to read blobs", "role for managed identity", "custom role definition", "assign role to identity". DO NOT USE FOR: creating or configuring managed identities, or general Azure security hardening; those are out of scope for this role-selection skill.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (13 → 20): azure-cloud-migrate
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #13 Current rank: #20 Delta: -7 Installs: 646 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Assess and migrate cross-cloud workloads to Azure. Generates assessment reports and converts code from AWS, GCP, or other providers to Azure services. WHEN: "migrate Lambda to Azure Functions", "migrate AWS to Azure", "Lambda migration assessment", "convert AWS serverless to Azure", "migration readiness report", "migrate from AWS", "migrate from GCP", "cross-cloud migration".

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (14 → 19): azure-observability
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #14 Current rank: #19 Delta: -5 Installs: 650 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Azure Observability Services including Azure Monitor, Application Insights, Log Analytics, Alerts, and Workbooks. Provides metrics, APM, distributed tracing, KQL queries, and interactive reports.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (2 → 8): azure-rbac
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #8 Delta: -6 Installs: 648 (prev 385) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Helps users find the right Azure RBAC role for an identity with least privilege access, then generate CLI commands and Bicep code to assign it. USE FOR: "what role should I assign", "least privilege role", "RBAC role for", "role to read blobs", "role for managed identity", "custom role definition", "assign role to identity". DO NOT USE FOR: creating or configuring managed identities, or general Azure security hardening; those are out of scope for this role-selection skill.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (3 → 5): microsoft-foundry
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #5 Delta: -2 Installs: 649 (prev 385) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Use this skill to work with Microsoft Foundry (Azure AI Foundry): deploy AI models from catalog, build RAG applications with knowledge indexes, create and evaluate AI agents, manage RBAC permissions and role assignments, manage quotas and capacity, create Foundry resources. USE FOR: Microsoft Foundry, AI Foundry, deploy model, model catalog, RAG, knowledge index, create agent, evaluate agent, agent monitoring, create Foundry project, new Foundry project, set up Foundry, onboard to Foundry, provision Foundry infrastructure, create Foundry resource, create AI Services, multi-service resource, AIServices kind, register resource provider, enable Cognitive Services, setup AI Services account, create resource group for Foundry, RBAC, role assignment, managed identity, service principal, permissions, quota, capacity, TPM, deployment failure, QuotaExceeded. DO NOT USE FOR: Azure Functions (use azure-functions), App Service (use azure-create-app), generic Azure resource creation (use azure-create-app).

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (33 → 50): skill-creator
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #50 Delta: -17 Installs: 90 (prev 96) Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (4 → 6): azure-cost-optimization
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #6 Delta: -2 Installs: 649 (prev 385) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Identify and quantify cost savings across Azure subscriptions by analyzing actual costs, utilization metrics, and generating actionable optimization recommendations. USE FOR: optimize Azure costs, reduce Azure spending, reduce Azure expenses, analyze Azure costs, find cost savings, generate cost optimization report, find orphaned resources, rightsize VMs, cost analysis, reduce waste, Azure spending analysis, find unused resources, optimize Redis costs. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), general Azure diagnostics (use azure-diagnostics), security issues (use azure-security)

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (5 → 10): azure-resource-lookup
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #10 Delta: -5 Installs: 648 (prev 385) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: List, find, and show Azure resources. Answers "list my VMs", "show my storage accounts", "list websites", "find container apps", "what resources do I have", and similar queries for any Azure resource type. USE FOR: list resources, list virtual machines, list VMs, list storage accounts, list websites, list web apps, list container apps, show resources, find resources, what resources do I have, list resources in resource group, list resources in subscription, find resources by tag, find orphaned resources, resource inventory, count resources by type, cross-subscription resource query, Azure Resource Graph, resource discovery, list container registries, list SQL servers, list Key Vaults, show resource groups, list app services, find resources across subscriptions, find unattached disks, tag analysis. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), creating or modifying resources, cost optimization (use azure-cost-optimization), writing application code, non-Azure clouds.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (6 → 18): azure-kusto
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #18 Delta: -12 Installs: 647 (prev 385) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Query and analyze data in Azure Data Explorer (Kusto/ADX) using KQL for log analytics, telemetry, and time series analysis. USE FOR: KQL queries, Kusto database queries, Azure Data Explorer, ADX clusters, log analytics, time series data, IoT telemetry, anomaly detection DO NOT USE FOR: SQL databases (use azure-postgres), NoSQL queries (use azure-storage), Elasticsearch, AWS analytics tools

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (8 → 11): appinsights-instrumentation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #8 Current rank: #11 Delta: -3 Installs: 647 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Guidance for instrumenting webapps with Azure Application Insights. Provides telemetry patterns, SDK setup, and configuration references. USE FOR: how to instrument app, App Insights SDK, telemetry patterns, what is App Insights, Application Insights guidance, instrumentation examples, APM best practices. DO NOT USE FOR: adding App Insights to my app (use azure-prepare), add telemetry to my project (use azure-prepare), add monitoring (use azure-prepare). This skill provides guidance—azure-prepare orchestrates component changes.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (11 → 9): azure-prepare
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #9 Delta: +2 Installs: 648 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Default entry point for Azure application development. Invoke this skill for ANY application work related to Azure: creating apps, building features, adding components, updating code, migrating, or modernizing. Analyzes your project and prepares it for Azure deployment by generating infrastructure code (Bicep/Terraform), azure.yaml configuration, and Dockerfiles. USE FOR: create an app, build a web app, create API, create frontend, create backend, add a feature, build a service, make an application, develop a project, migrate my app, modernize my code, update my application, add database, add authentication, add caching, deploy to Azure, host on Azure, Azure with Terraform (defaults to azd+Terraform), Azure with azd, generate azure.yaml, generate Bicep or Terraform, prepare Azure Functions. DO NOT USE FOR: only validating an already-prepared app (use azure-validate), only running azd up/deploy (use azure-deploy), pure Terraform without azd (prefer azd+Terraform).

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (20 → 17): azure-compliance
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #20 Current rank: #17 Delta: +3 Installs: 647 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Comprehensive Azure compliance and security auditing capabilities including best practices assessment, Key Vault expiration monitoring, and resource configuration validation. USE FOR: compliance scan, security audit, azqr, Azure best practices, Key Vault expiration check, compliance assessment, resource review, configuration validation, expired certificates, expiring secrets, orphaned resources, policy compliance, security posture evaluation. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), cost analysis alone (use azure-cost-optimization), active security hardening (use azure-security-hardening), general Azure Advisor queries (use azure-observability).

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (21 → 7): azure-diagnostics
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #21 Current rank: #7 Delta: +14 Installs: 649 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Debug and troubleshoot production issues on Azure. Covers Container Apps diagnostics, log analysis with KQL, health checks, and common issue resolution for image pulls, cold starts, and health probes. USE FOR: debug production issues, troubleshoot container apps, analyze logs with KQL, fix image pull failures, resolve cold start issues, investigate health probe failures, check resource health, view application logs, find root cause of errors DO NOT USE FOR: deploying applications (use azure-deploy), creating new resources (use azure-prepare), setting up monitoring (use azure-observability), cost optimization (use azure-cost-optimization)

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (22 → 4): azure-ai
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #22 Current rank: #4 Delta: +18 Installs: 650 (prev 386) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Use for Azure AI: Search, Speech, OpenAI, Document Intelligence. Helps with search, vector/hybrid search, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, transcription, OCR. USE FOR: AI Search, query search, vector search, hybrid search, semantic search, speech-to-text, text-to-speech, transcribe, OCR, convert text to speech. DO NOT USE FOR: Function apps/Functions (use azure-functions), databases (azure-postgres/azure-kusto), general Azure resources.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (26 → 1): remotion-render
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #26 Current rank: #1 Delta: +25 Installs: 800 (prev 436) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (46 → 32): python-sdk
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #46 Current rank: #32 Delta: +14 Installs: 98 (prev 53) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. Triggers: python sdk, inferencesh, pip install, python api, python client, async inference, python agent, tool builder python, programmatic ai, python integration, sdk python

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (7 → 3): azure-storage
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #3 Delta: +4 Installs: 650 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Azure Storage Services including Blob Storage, File Shares, Queue Storage, Table Storage, and Data Lake. Provides object storage, SMB file shares, async messaging, NoSQL key-value, and big data analytics capabilities. Includes access tiers (hot, cool, archive) and lifecycle management.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (9 → 2): azure-deploy
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #2 Delta: +7 Installs: 651 (prev 384) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Execute deployment to Azure. Final step after preparation and validation. Runs azd up, azd deploy, or infrastructure provisioning commands. USE FOR: run azd up, run azd deploy, execute deployment, provision infrastructure, push to production, go live, ship it, deploy web app, deploy container app, deploy static site, deploy Azure Functions, bicep deploy, terraform apply. DO NOT USE FOR: creating or building apps (use azure-prepare), validating before deploy (use azure-validate).

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (1 → 9): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #1 Current rank: #9 Delta: -8 Installs: 13016 (prev 13261) Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (4 → 7): ai-video-generation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #4 Current rank: #7 Delta: -3 Installs: 13322 (prev 10955) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate AI videos with Google Veo, Seedance, Wan, Grok and 40+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3, Seedance 1.5 Pro, Wan 2.5, Grok Imagine Video, OmniHuman, Fabric, HunyuanVideo. Capabilities: text-to-video, image-to-video, lipsync, avatar animation, video upscaling, foley sound. Use for: social media videos, marketing content, explainer videos, product demos, AI avatars. Triggers: video generation, ai video, text to video, image to video, veo, animate image, video from image, ai animation, video generator, generate video, t2v, i2v, ai video maker, create video with ai, runway alternative, pika alternative, sora alternative, kling alternative

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (11 → 10): find-skills
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #10 Delta: +1 Installs: 10939 (prev 9054) Source: vercel-labs/skills Description: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.

item.title: [Trending] Rank up (22 → 17): azure-cost-optimization
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #22 Current rank: #17 Delta: +5 Installs: 7246 (prev 4080) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Identify and quantify cost savings across Azure subscriptions by analyzing actual costs, utilization metrics, and generating actionable optimization recommendations. item.title: [Trending] Rank up (3 → 1): agent-tools
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #1 Delta: +2 Installs: 13496 (prev 10966) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #4 Delta: +1 Installs: 13405 (prev 10922) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. item.title: [Trending] Rank up (7 → 5): ai-image-generation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #5 Delta: +2 Installs: 13400 (prev 10876) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. item.title: [Trending] Rank up (8 → 3): remotion-render
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #8 Current rank: #3 Delta: +5 Installs: 13438 (prev 10855) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. item.title: [Trending] Rank up (9 → 8): nano-banana
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #8 Delta: +1 Installs: 13178 (prev 10709) Source: inference-sh-9/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini native image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Gemini 3 Pro Image, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input.
